description: Run the full nf-core/pacsomatic preparation path with --dry-run: validate identifiers (no spaces, tumor!=normal), check local BAM/PBI existence and reference mode, probe runtime/dependency tools, and write all launch artifacts (samplesheet.csv, params YAML, launch script) under record_store WITHOUT executing or submitting anything.
rules: read-only — validates and writes artifacts only, never executes or submits the pipeline
exactly one reference mode: provide FASTA or GENOME
local BAMs must exist; a provided PBI must exist; remote (http/s3/gs/ftp) BAMs skip local checks
uses --use-current-path so no conda env is required; missing nextflow/java/container tools only WARN in dry-run
writes dry_run.log plus samplesheet.csv, pacsomatic.params.generated.yaml, run_pacsomatic.<executor>.sh under record_store
usage: Set PATIENT_ID, TUMOR_SAMPLE_ID, NORMAL_SAMPLE_ID, TUMOR_BAM, NORMAL_BAM, one of FASTA or GENOME, and optionally PROFILE/EXECUTOR. Output: dry_run.log (and the artifact set).
limitation: Validation downgrades missing run-time tools to warnings; a genuine run still requires nextflow + the selected container/conda runtime via the submit perk.
